title: Root Layout Component
content:
This `layout.tsx` file defines the root layout for the entire application. It sets up global styles, fonts, and integrates with Clerk for authentication.

**Purpose:**

- To provide a consistent HTML structure for all pages.
- To apply global CSS classes and import custom fonts.
- To wrap the entire application within the Clerk authentication provider.

**Key Exports/Functions/Props:**

- `metadata`: Defines metadata for the application, including title and description.
- `RootLayout` (default export): A React component that serves as the main layout. It accepts `children` as a prop, which represents the content of the current page or nested layout.

**Key Features:**

- **Font Integration:** Uses `Geist` and `Geist_Mono` fonts, applying them via CSS variables (`--font-geist-sans`, `--font-geist-mono`).
- **Clerk Provider:** Wraps all content with `<ClerkProvider />` to enable Clerk's authentication services.
- **Global Styling:** Applies global styles and dark mode by setting `h-full`, `antialiased`, and `dark` classes on the `<html>` tag.
- **Body Styling:** Sets `min-h-full` and `flex flex-col` on the `<body>` tag for proper layout management.

**Usage:**

This component is automatically used by Next.js to render all pages. Developers do not need to explicitly import or use it elsewhere. Any components rendered within `<body className="min-h-full flex flex-col">{children}</body>` will inherit the global styles and authentication context provided by this layout.
